title: Taj SATS Digital Technologies is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Taj SATS Digital Technologies is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Taj SATS Digital Technologies is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Lucknow. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Taj SATS Digital Technologies:
Taj SATS Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Travel Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Taj SATS Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
